recipes.name: 100% Pure Cacao Powder
recipes.notes: Unsweetened 100% cacao powder. ~2 tablespoons per serving.

recipes.name: Shirataki Konjac Rice (Jordan Farms, dry)
recipes.notes: Jordan Farms/Sunnywood. Net carbs: 22.4g per 100g. Label is for dry/uncooked weight. Absorbs water 1:1 when cooked (weight increases but macros unchanged). 25g dry = 26 kcal, 1g P, 6g C (0.4g fiber), 0.1g F.

recipes.name: Flax seeds (brown) - Nutty Fields
recipes.notes: Net carbs (27g fiber subtracted from 28.9g total). Original label: 28.9g total carbs per 100g.

recipes.name: Flax Seed Bread
recipes.notes: Also contains: ½ tsp salt, 1 tsp baking powder, 1 tbsp vinegar (negligible macros)

recipes.name: Australia's Own Full Cream Milk
recipes.notes: Australia's Own brand. Full cream dairy milk. Per 100ml from label.

recipes.name: L. Reuteri Yogurt (unstrained, 36hr)
recipes.notes: Made from Australia's Own Full Cream Milk, 36hr ferment. Virtually all lactose consumed. Unstrained = same protein/fat as base milk, no concentration.

recipes.name: Kefir (unstrained, 36hr)
recipes.notes: Fermented 36h from Australia's Own Full Cream Milk, unstrained

recipes.name: Kefir (strained, 48hr)
recipes.notes: Full cream milk, 48hr fermented, strained. Concentrated protein/fat, near-zero carbs.

recipes.name: Maltodextrin (Pre-Ride)
recipes.notes: TKD pre-ride fuel. Take 5-10 min before biking. Mix in water. Scale: 10g/20min, 15g/30min.

recipes.name: Big Ass Protein Shake
recipes.notes: 200g Greek yogurt (60% strained), 400ml L. Rhamnosus, 30g ON whey, 50g walnuts, 170ml liquid whey for blending

recipes.name: Keto Chocolate Paste
recipes.notes: Coconut oil + pure cacao powder + stevia. Per 100g.

recipes.name: L. Plantarum Yogurt (unstrained, 24hr)
recipes.notes: 24hr ferment, slightly more lactose than 36hr versions

biomarker_definitions.name: ApoB
biomarker_definitions.description: Apolipoprotein B - primary driver of atherosclerosis. Lower is better for longevity.

biomarker_definitions.name: Lp(a)
biomarker_definitions.description: Lipoprotein(a) - genetically determined CVD risk factor. Measure once, mostly stable.

biomarker_definitions.name: CAC Score
biomarker_definitions.description: Coronary Artery Calcium score - direct measure of arterial calcification. 0 is optimal.

biomarker_definitions.name: HDL-C
biomarker_definitions.description: High-density lipoprotein cholesterol. Higher is generally better.

biomarker_definitions.name: LDL-C
biomarker_definitions.description: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol. Lower is better for most people.

biomarker_definitions.name: HbA1c
biomarker_definitions.description: Glycated hemoglobin - 3-month average blood sugar. Lower indicates better glucose control.

biomarker_definitions.name: Fasting Insulin
biomarker_definitions.description: Fasting insulin level - marker of insulin sensitivity. Lower is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: Fasting Glucose
biomarker_definitions.description: Fasting blood glucose. Optimal range indicates good metabolic health.

biomarker_definitions.name: hs-CRP
biomarker_definitions.description: High-sensitivity C-reactive protein - systemic inflammation marker. Lower is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: Homocysteine
biomarker_definitions.description: Homocysteine - cardiovascular and cognitive risk marker. Optimal is 5-9.

biomarker_definitions.name: RDW
biomarker_definitions.description: Red cell distribution width - marker of cellular health and mortality risk.

biomarker_definitions.name: Epigenetic Age
biomarker_definitions.description: Biological age based on DNA methylation patterns. Compare to chronological age.

biomarker_definitions.name: Telomere Length
biomarker_definitions.description: Telomere length - cellular aging marker. Higher/longer is generally better.

biomarker_definitions.name: VO2 Max
biomarker_definitions.description: Maximal oxygen uptake - strongest predictor of all-cause mortality. Higher is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: Grip Strength
biomarker_definitions.description: Handgrip strength - functional health and mortality predictor. Higher is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: Gait Speed
biomarker_definitions.description: Walking speed - strong predictor of healthspan. Faster is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: Vitamin D
biomarker_definitions.description: 25-hydroxyvitamin D - optimal range for bone, immune, and overall health.

biomarker_definitions.name: eGFR
biomarker_definitions.description: Estimated glomerular filtration rate - kidney function marker. Higher is better.

biomarker_definitions.name: NAD+
biomarker_definitions.description: Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide - cellular energy marker. Emerging longevity biomarker.
